hardware.gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX, gfx1100, HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1, sysfs card0 total 23.984375 GiB
hardware.notes: hipEngine tracked peak comes from hipengine allocator; sampled HIP peak is phase-boundary hipMemGetInfo in raw sweep JSON.

interpretation: Apples-to-apples Q4_K_M pp512 confirms the short-prefill gap: llama.cpp HIP is +46.7% over current hipEngine Q4_K_M pp512; Vulkan is +28.1%.
hipEngine Q4_K_M decode remains faster than the user llama.cpp Q4_K_M tg128 row (+32.3% vs HIP, +55.9% vs Vulkan), so the immediate gap remains prefill.
Q4_K_M primary-shape residency is 22.491 GiB tracked / about 23.068 GiB sampled HIP used, leaving less than 1 GiB free on GPU1; Q4_K_S remains the safer active tuning gate for 128K promotion.
reason_not_promoted: Measurement-only parity refresh; no runtime code changed and no hipEngine performance improvement is claimed.
